mapper.select: SELECT T2.chat_room_id , T2.chat_room_type , CASE WHEN T2.chat_room_type = 'DIRECT' AND (T3.deleted = 1 OR T3.user_id IS NULL) THEN '알 수 없음' WHEN T2.chat_room_type = 'DIRECT' THEN T3.username ELSE T2.room_name END AS room_name , T2.last_message_preview , T2.last_message_at , T2.last_message_seq - T1.last_read_seq AS unread_count FROM chat_room_user T1 INNER JOIN chat_room T2 ON T1.chat_room_id = T2.chat_room_id LEFT JOIN user T3 ON T2.chat_room_type = 'DIRECT' AND ( (T3.user_id = T2.direct_user1_id AND T2.direct_user2_id = #{userId}) OR (T3.user_id = T2.direct_user2_id AND T2.direct_user1_id = #{userId}) ) WHERE T1.user_id = #{userId} AND T1.chat_room_user_status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY T2.last_message_at DESC
SELECT last_message_seq FROM chat_room WHERE chat_room_id = #{chatRoomId} FOR UPDATE
